message:
fix(storage): disk pressure alerting and file lock race condition in WBQ drain

Critical reliability fixes in the storage layer:

- Warn and skip Write-Behind Queue operations under critical disk
  pressure to prevent silent data corruption when the filesystem is
  nearly full
- Fix file lock release race condition: remove temporary files BEFORE
  releasing flock to prevent other processes from acquiring the lock
  and finding stale data in the gap between release and cleanup

Improves durability under high disk load and concurrent lock contention
scenarios common in multi-agent environments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
